relevant_posts.title: Test Post: AI in Business

relevant_posts.relevance_reason: Directly relates to the student's interest in AI and real business applications.
relevant_posts.suggested_comment: This is a great example of how AI is reshaping business strategy. The parallels to Clayton Christensen's disruption theory are striking — incumbent firms often underestimate AI adoption curves until it's too late to respond.
